prompt:
A researcher claims that solar installations in the county grew steadily from 2020 to 2023.

Which finding from the table most directly supports the claim?

choices.text: Almost all of the change happened between 2020 and 2020, with little movement afterward.
choices.rationale: The value changes in every year shown, not just the first span.

choices.text: Across all 6 years shown, the value rose from 329 to 388 units.
choices.rationale: Correct. This matches the steady, one-direction trend the claim describes across every year shown.

choices.text: The value changed by the same amount every year, a constant 12 units per year.
choices.rationale: The year-to-year changes vary, so the change was not a constant 12 units.

choices.text: The value rose by more than 35 units in a single year.
choices.rationale: The largest one-year change was only 15 units.

explanation: The supporting statement must reflect the table's actual, consistent trend across all the years shown.
